content: Initial orientation and environment setup. Learning about the company workflow and tools.
Started working on the UI implementation. Creating reusable components.
Integration of backend APIs. Handling data flow and state management.
Working on user authentication and session management.
Implemented dashboard layouts and data visualization widgets.
Code refactoring and optimization for better performance.
Writing unit tests for frontend components using Jest and React Testing Library.
Participated in agile ceremonies, sprint planning, and daily stand-ups.
Debugged and fixed critical production issues related to state sync.
Explored new technologies like Next.js for potential future migrations.
Documenting the frontend architecture and creating API interface guidelines.
Final project presentation preparation and handover documentation.
